comments.author: @DNF369
comments.text: Ecuador has a small population of Africans so speak facts. Actually they are mostly indigenous but are ashamed. Mestizos mixed with European and indigenous are the second population. Then you have minorties of Africans, chinese, european, people from tbe middle east. The information is partially false.

comments.author: @haydeeotero6507
comments.text:
I am glad that you had visited Ecuador, however, you are 22:40 showing only a couple of towns.  We have 21 Provinces, each with their unique culture, cuisine and diverse population.  We have more than four y tribes with their unique ancestry culture, which we love and respect.  We also have many cities, for example, Quito, the Capital of Ecuador, population over two million, Guayaquil, equaly populated, followed by Cuenca and over 18 other cities.
Please, show the real life style of the country, not only few views of the same.
